name: Jello Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. On low heat, gently warm the mixture until it becomes clear.
2. Once clear, pour it over a large bowl of popcorn.
3. Shape the mixture into balls. This is an easy and flavorful treat that kids love, especially when using lime or strawberry flavors.
(Note: Ensure to have a great day while enjoying your creation!)
